Based on your framework analysis:

**1. Best CSP:**
NVDA $185 strike, 2026-06-05, 34 DTE, $4.55/$4.65 bid/ask, 0.26 delta, 26.7% annualized return

**2. Best CC:**
No qualifying CCs meet criteria (all positions either extended or failing quality checks)

**3. Best LEAPS:**
MSFT $195 strike, 2028-01-21, 629 DTE, $229.50/$234.00 bid/ask, 0.99 delta - only quality name passing checks but trend suggests waiting for stabilization

**4. Best Bull Call Spread:**
None available

**5. Best Position Income CC:**
GOOGL $400 strike, 2026-06-18, 47 DTE, $11.70/$12.10 bid/ask, 0.40 delta, 24.0% annualized return (profit position)

**IVP Environment:** Mixed volatility with IVP 62-91% on most names making entries expensive, but NVDA CSP still attractive despite elevated IV due to strong quality metrics and reasonable positioning below recent highs.
